caption: In a clinical simulation room, several medical professionals wearing scrubs, masks, and gloves are gathered around a medical mannequin lying on a bed covered with a white sheet. A person in a light pink t-shirt stands on the left, while others in dark blue scrubs perform procedures on the mannequin. The room is equipped with medical monitors and various supplies on a bedside table. On-screen text on the left side of the image lists learning objectives; initially, it shows "Trauma resuscitation" and "Admission order writing," but as the sequence progresses, a third item, "ED Consultation/IV trainer," appears. A logo for "Sim Week" with a stylized icon of a building is visible in the lower right corner. Throughout the frames, the staff continues their coordinated efforts to stabilize the mannequin, while the text updates to reflect the training curriculum.
